# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent service mesh security.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: install.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: IstioOperator
metadata:
  name: istio-admin
spec:
  components:
    ingressGateways:
      - name: istio-ingressgateway
        enabled: true
        k8s:
          service:
            ports:
              - port: 15000
                targetPort: 15000
                name: admin
  values:
    global:
      proxy:
        adminPort: 15000
    pilot:
      configMap: true
    sidecarInjectorWebhook:
      injectLabel: istio-injection
    security:
      admin:
        enabled: true
        port: 15000
        host: 127.0.0.1
        accessControl:
          allowed:
            - source:
                principal: cluster.local/ns/default/sa/admin
            - source:
                ip: 10.0.0.0/8
            - source:
                ip: 172.16.0.0/12
            - source:
                ip: 192.168.0.0/16
    telemetry:
      v2:
        prometheus:
          configOverride:
            inboundTraffic:
              enabled: true
    meshConfig:
      defaultConfig:
        proxyAdminPort: 15000
        proxyMetadata:
          ISTIO_META_ADMIN_PORT: "15000"
          ISTIO_META_PROXY_ADMIN_PORT: "15000"
      accessLogFile: /dev/stdout
      accessLogFormat: "%START_TIME% %REQ(:METHOD)% %REQ(X-FORWARDED-FOR)% %REQ(:AUTHORITY)% %RESP(:STATUS)% %RESP(:REASON)% %DURATION% %REQ(USER-AGENT)% %REQ(X-REQUEST-ID)% %REQ(X-TRACE-ID)%
